use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and dialogs
Destructive action triggers with red styling
Secondary navigation or alternative action buttons
Ghost-style buttons for less prominent UI actions
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbar interfaces
ai_summary: A versatile, production-ready button component with CVA-based variant system supporting default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Includes size variants, focus-visible states, disabled handling, and asChild pattern support via Radix Slot for flexible composition. Built with accessibility best practices including focus outlines and keyboard navigation.
